meta.name: Freight Cost Calculator
meta.description: Industrial-grade freight cost analysis tool incorporating ISO 9001, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards for total landed cost, waste identification, and continuous improvement.

inputs.label: Shipment Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of the shipment, including packaging. Used for rate base and dimensional weight calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of the shipment, including packaging. Used for rate base and dimensional weight calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ambalaj dahil gönderinin toplam ağırlığı. Oran tabanı ve hacimsel ağırlık hesaplamaları için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgewicht der Sendung inklusive Verpackung. Wird für die Tarifbasis und die Berechnung des Volumengewichts verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids total de l'envoi, emballage inclus. Utilisé pour le taux de base et le calcul du poids volumétrique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso total del envío, incluido el embalaje. Se utiliza para la tarifa base y cálculos de peso volumétrico.

inputs.label: Shipment Volume (cbm)
inputs.businessContext: Total cubic meters of the shipment. Used for dimensional weight factor and space utilization analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cubic meters of the shipment. Used for dimensional weight factor and space utilization analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gönderinin toplam metreküpü. Hacimsel ağırlık faktörü ve alan kullanım analizi için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtvolumen der Sendung in Kubikmetern. Wird für den Volumengewichtsfaktor und die Raumnutzungsanalyse verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mètres cubes totaux de l'envoi. Utilisé pour le facteur de poids volumétrique et l'analyse de l'utilisation de l'espace.
businessContext_i18n.es: Metros cúbicos totales del envío. Se utiliza para el factor de peso volumétrico y análisis de utilización del espacio.

inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total transport distance from origin to destination. Influences fuel surcharge and time-based costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total transport distance from origin to destination. Influences fuel surcharge and time-based costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Menşeiden varış noktasına toplam taşıma mesafesi. Yakıt ek ücretini ve zamana dayalı maliyetleri etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamttransportdistanz vom Ursprung zum Ziel. Beeinflusst den Treibstoffzuschlag und die zeitbasierten Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale de transport de l'origine à la destination. Influence la surcharge carburant et les coûts basés sur le temps.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total de transporte desde el origen hasta el destino. Influye en el recargo de combustible y costes basados en tiempo.

inputs.label: Transport Mode
inputs.businessContext: Mode of transport. Each mode has distinct cost structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mode of transport. Each mode has distinct cost structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taşıma modu. Her modun farklı maliyet yapıları, risk profilleri ve karbon etkisi vardır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Transportart. Jede Art hat unterschiedliche Kostenstrukturen, Risikoprofile und CO₂-Auswirkungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mode de transport. Chaque mode a des structures de coûts, des profils de risque et un impact carbone distincts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Modo de transporte. Cada modo tiene estructuras de coste, perfiles de riesgo e impacto de carbono distintos.

inputs.label: Fuel Surcharge (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage applied to base freight rate to account for fuel price variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage applied to base freight rate to account for fuel price variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt fiyatı değişkenliğini hesaba katmak için temel navlun oranına uygulanan yüzde. Genellikle DOE veya IATA'ya endekslenir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der auf den Basisfrachtsatz angewendet wird, um die Treibstoffpreisschwankungen zu berücksichtigen. Typischerweise an DOE oder IATA indexiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage appliqué au tarif de base pour tenir compte de la variabilité du prix du carburant. Généralement indexé sur le DOE ou l'IATA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje aplicado a la tarifa de flete base para tener en cuenta la variabilidad del precio del combustible. Generalmente indexado al DOE o IATA.

inputs.label: Accessorial Charges (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arka kapı asansörü, konut teslimatı, iç teslimat, alıkoyma vb. için ek ücretler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Gebühren für Hebebühne, Zustellung an Wohnadresse, Innenzustellung, Standgeld usw.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais supplémentaires pour hayon, livraison résidentielle, livraison à l'intérieur, surestaries, etc.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifas adicionales por plataforma elevadora, entrega residencial, entrega interior, detención, etc.

inputs.label: Density Factor (kg/cbm)
inputs.businessContext: Actual density of the shipment. Used to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual density of the shipment. Used to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gönderinin gerçek yoğunluğu. LTL sınıfı veya hava kargo ücrete tabi ağırlığı için kırılma noktalarına karşı karşılaştırmada kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Dichte der Sendung. Wird verwendet, um mit Grenzwerten für LTL-Klasse oder Luftfracht-berechnungsgewicht zu vergleichen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité réelle de l'envoi. Utilisée pour comparer aux seuils de classe LTL ou au poids taxable du fret aérien.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad real del envío. Se utiliza para comparar con puntos de referencia para clase LTL o peso facturable de carga aérea.

inputs.label: Hazardous Material
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gönderinin tehlikeli madde içerdiğini belirtir. Ek uyumluluk ve elleçleme ücretlerini tetikler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob die Sendung gefährliche Güter enthält. Löst zusätzliche Compliance- und Handhabungsgebühren aus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si l'envoi contient des marchandises dangereuses. Déclenche des frais de conformité et de manutention supplémentaires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si el envío contiene mercancías peligrosas. Activa tarifas adicionales de cumplimiento y manipulación.

rules.message: Both weight and volume must be positive for dimensional weight calculation.
Density factor must be between 10 and 5000 kg/cbm.
Air freight recommended for distances > 3000 km. Consider ocean for cost efficiency.
Hazardous materials by air require IATA DGR compliance and may be restricted.

thresholds.message: Fuel surcharge exceeds 25% — consider fuel hedging or modal shift.
Low density shipment — potential for dimensional weight penalty. Re-evaluate packaging.
Accessorial charges > $500 — audit for unnecessary services.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
